falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 2% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish breakout, contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is invalid.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 50% above the 14-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a blowoff top or bottom, invalidating the current HOLD and suggesting a reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Commitment of Traders (COT) report shows net long positions increase by 30% in a single week
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate institutional buying pressure overwhelming the market, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict by confirming a directional bias.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
